g[8][0X7]=(g[0Xa])-(0X173BFFB) g[4][0x1]=(g[18][0X1])-(0x587af89) local s=[==[&`ANXkI(UP2Rn‌+q4UiCj]==]g[0x12][0X4]=(g[0xA])-(0X173c057) g[0X7][0X6]=(-(0X2DC043F))+(0X2dc04fa) g[0X4][6]=(g[0XF])-(0x296ff8b) local function t(u) local v={} u=e(u,"\026","") u=e(u,a(0Xe2,g[0x12][5],0X8b),"") u=e(u,a(0xe2,g[0x12][0X5],140),"") u=e(u,a(226,0X81,0Xa0),"") u=e(u,a(0Xef,g[0x7][0X6],191),"") local w={} local x=0x1 for y=0x1,#u do local z=b(u,y) if z>=g[0X12][0x4] and z<=g[0XC] then w[x]=a(z) x+=0x1 end end u=c(w) local ba=#u local bb=0X1 local bc=0x1 if not(((g[0x8][0x6]) and(g[0X8][0X8]))) then else while bb<=ba do local bd=bb+g[0X4][0x3] local be=(bd<=ba) and g[0x4][6] or(ba-bb+0x1) if be==0x0 then break end local bf,bg,bh,bi,bj=b(u,bb,bd) bg=if bg then bg else g[0XC];bh=if not(not bh) then bh else g[0xC];while g[0X7][0x3] do bi=if not(not bi) then bi else g[0Xc];break end bj=bj or g[0Xc] local bk=((((bf-g[0x12][0x4])*g[0x7][0X4]+(bg-g[0x12][0x4]))*g[7][0x4]+(bh-g[0X12][0x4]))*g[0x7][0X4]+(bi-g[0X12][4]))*g[0x7][0X4]+(bj-g[0X12][0x4]) local bl=bk//0X1000000%g[4][0x1] local bm=bk//0X10000%g[0x4][0X1] local bn=bk//g[0X4][1]%g[0x4][0X1] local bo=bk%g[0x4][0X1] local bp=a(bl,bm,bn,bo) if be<g[0X4][6] then bp=d(bp,0x1,be-0x1) end v[bc]=bp bc+=0x1 bb+=g[0x4][0x6] end end return c(v) end g[0x8][0x5]=(g[20])-(0x5D6E18E) local function bq(br,bs) local bt={} local bu=#bs for bv=0X1,#br do local bw=((bv-0x1)%bu)+0x1 bt[bv]=a((b(br,bv)-b(bs,bw))%g[4][0X1]) end return c(bt) end g[0X8][0x4]=(g[0x2])-(0X1C1A388) g[0X8][0X1]=(g[0x3])-(0x515B8B3) local function bx(by) local bz=b(by,1) if bz==0X0 then if not(((g[0x7][0X2]) and(g[0X8][0X6]))) then else return d(by,g[0X8][0X4]) end end local ca={} local cb=0X1 local cc=g[0X8][0x4] local cd=#by while cc<=cd do local ce=b(by,cc) cc+=0x1 if ce<g[0x12][0X5] then local cf=ce+1 for cg=0,cf-1 do ca[cb]=d(by,cc+cg,cc+cg) cb+=0x1 end cc+=cf elseif ce<0xC0 then local ch=ce-g[0X8][0x7] local ci=b(by,cc) cc+=0X1 local cj=cb-ci for ck=0x0,ch-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cj+ck] cb+=1 end elseif ce<g[0x8][0X1] then local cl=ce-0xbc local cm=b(by,cc)*g[0X4][0x1]+b(by,cc+0X1) cc+=g[0X8][0X4] local cn=cb-cm for co=0,cl-1 do if not(((g[0X12][0X6]) and(g[0X8][0X2]))) then else ca[cb]=ca[cn+co] end cb+=0x1 end elseif ce==g[0x8][0x1] then local cp=b(by,cc)+0X24 local cq=b(by,cc+0x1)*g[4][0x1]+b(by,cc+g[8][0X4]) cc+=g[0X8][0x5] local cr=cb-cq for cs=0X0,cp-1 do ca[cb]=ca[cr+cs] cb+=0x1 end else local ct=b(by,cc)+g[0X4][0x3] local cu=d(by,cc+0x1,cc+0X1) cc+=g[8][0X4] for cv=0x0,ct-0X1 do ca[cb]=cu cb+=0x1 end end end return c(ca) end g[0X7][0x1]=(0x1c46aa3)-(0X1C46A10) local cw=bx(bq(t(r),t(s))) g[18][0X2]=(g[4][0x5])-(0X4d61cdd) g[4][0x2]=(0X5156ae)-(0x5155C1) if b(cw,0X1)~=0X95 or b(cw,g[0x8][4])~=g[0X4][0X2] or b(cw,g[0X8][0x5])~=g[0X12][0x2] or b(cw,g[0X4][0X3])~=g[0x7][1] then while true do end end local cx=f(d(cw,g[0X4][0X6]))() return cx(...) end)(string.char,string.byte,table.concat,string.sub,string.gsub,loadstring,...)
